ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., unit test, integration test) */,
  "num_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests in the suite */,
  "num_suites" INTEGER /* Number of test suites */,
  "num_failures" INTEGER /* Number of test failures */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last updated */,
  "executor" TEXT /* Tool or framework used to execute the test */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILURE) */,
  "result_message" TEXT /* Message describing the test result */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test */,
  "log_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the log file for the test */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name of the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILURE) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the build */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the build */,
  "build_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the build */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash associated with the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the metric belongs to */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the metric belongs to */,
  "mvn_time_avg" REAL /* Average Maven build time */,
  "mvn_time_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of Maven build time */,
  "xml_time_avg" REAL /* Average XML build time */,
  "xml_time_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of XML build time */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during the test/build */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during the test/build */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Average disk I/O during the test/build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
